mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM upboard
writer like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
title like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
content like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE upboard set hit=hit+1 WHERE num=#{num}
mapper.select: SELECT num, title, writer, CONTENT, hit, reip, bdate, imgn FROM upboard WHERE num=#{num}
